subject: Full Fleet Audit Results — May 30, 2026
message:
Completed full audit of all 17 apps before Billy arrives. Results:

✅ 11 APPS UP (200):
- FloodClaims Pro (billy-floods.up.railway.app) — health 200, all security headers present
- Sweet Spot Cakes — health 200, FIXED missing HSTS+CSP headers (pushed and verified live)
- Liberty Emporium, Agents Dashboard, Main Site, Shop, Remote Repair, Voice Makeover, Vet Tech, Inventory Demo, IT Courses

🔴 5 APPS DOWN:
- AI Studio (DNS NXDOMAIN)
- AI Widget (DNS NXDOMAIN — known, needs name.com fix)
- Consignments (DNS NXDOMAIN)
- Contractor (Railway 404 — needs redeploy)
- GymForge (Railway 404 — needs redeploy)

🟡 1 APP DEGRADED:
- EcDash (HTTP 404)

FIX APPLIED:
- Sweet Spot: Added Strict-Transport-Security and Content-Security-Python headers to after_request. Committed (17157f9), pushed, verified live on Railway.

Customer-facing apps (FloodClaims Pro + Sweet Spot) are SOLID for demo day. All security headers, health checks, and endpoints passing.
